narrative:
Solon City has 17,746 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.8 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +16.2% D−R vs +12.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
